title: thalictrum exaltatum subsp. mediterraneum
intro: Thalictrum exaltatum subsp. mediterraneum, also known as the Alpine Meadow Rue, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buttercup family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thalictrum exaltatum subsp. mediterraneum are attributed to its ability to reduce swelling and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
